description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized imatinib for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients who are at significant risk of relapse following resection of Kit (CD 117) positive gastrointestinal stromal tumors (GIST). Patients who have a low or very low risk of recurrence should not received adjuvant treatment.

contributions.description: Adding EMA approvals for use to database

indication.indication: Glivec is indicated for the treatment of the adjuvant treatment of adult patients who are at significant risk of relapse following resection of Kit (CD117)-positive GIST. Patients who have a low or very low risk of recurrence should not receive adjuvant treatment.
